sms.otpCode: Your PerkValet code is {{code}}. It expires in {{minutes}} minutes.
sms.rewardExpiry: PerkValet: Your {{value}} reward at {{merchantName}} expires {{date}}. Open your app to activate.

email.rewardExpirySubject: Your PerkValet reward at {{merchantName}} expires in {{count}} day
email.rewardExpirySubject_plural: Your PerkValet reward at {{merchantName}} expires in {{count}} days
email.rewardExpiryBody: Hi {{name}}, your {{description}}{{valueClause}} at {{merchantName}} expires on {{date}}. Open PerkValet to activate it before it expires.

chat.howto_create_promotion: To create a promotion, go to **Promotions** from your dashboard and tap **Create Promotion**. Choose your reward type, set the stamp milestone, and publish when ready.
chat.howto_create_product: Go to **Products** from your dashboard, then tap **Add Product**. Set the name, category, and price. Products link to your promotions so stamps go to the right purchases.
chat.howto_add_store: Go to **My Stores** and tap **Add Store**. Enter the store name, address, and hours. If you have a POS connection, the store will sync automatically.
chat.howto_add_user: Go to **Team** from your dashboard and tap **Invite Member**. Enter their email and choose their role. They'll get an email to set up their account.
chat.howto_qr_code: Your QR codes are in **My Stores**. Tap your store, then look for the **QR Code** section. You can download and print the code for your counter.
chat.howto_create_bundle: Go to **Bundles** from your dashboard and tap **Create Bundle**. Select the products to include and set the bundle price.
chat.where_settings: Your settings are at **Settings** — tap the gear icon on your dashboard. From there you can update your profile, change your password, and configure account preferences.
chat.where_analytics: Your analytics are in **Analytics** — tap the chart icon on your dashboard. You'll see KPIs, trends, and promotion performance for the last 30 days.
chat.where_billing: Your invoices are in **Invoices** from your dashboard. Your plan details and upgrade options are on the **Your Plan** page.
chat.feature_growth_advisor: **Growth Advisor** gives you AI-powered recommendations tailored to your store. It suggests what promotion to run next and why, based on your actual data.
chat.feature_weekly: Your **Weekly Summary** shows last week's performance, this week's events, and anything that needs your attention. It's updated every Monday.
chat.feature_simulator: The **Promotion Simulator** lets you project the ROI of a promotion before you launch it. See expected stamps, rewards, and revenue impact.
chat.plan_upgrade: Visit your **Your Plan** page to see what's included in your current plan and what Value-Added unlocks. You can upgrade right from that page.
chat.troubleshoot_stamps:
If stamps aren't accumulating, check these things:
1. Is the promotion **Active**? (not Draft or Paused)
2. Is the customer giving their phone number at checkout?
3. Is your POS connection healthy? Check **My Stores** for the connection status.

If everything looks right and stamps still aren't working, let me create a support request.
chat.troubleshoot_login:
Try these steps:
1. Make sure you're using the right email (case doesn't matter)
2. Use **Forgot password?** on the login page to reset
3. Check your email for the reset link — it expires in 15 minutes

If you're still locked out, let me create a support request.
chat.roleBlocked: That action requires {{roles}} access. Check with the account owner to get the right permissions.
chat.tierBlocked_bundle: Bundles are a Value-Added feature. Visit **Your Plan** to learn more.
chat.tierBlocked_growth_advisor: Growth Advisor is a Value-Added feature. Visit **Your Plan** to see what you'd unlock.
chat.tierBlocked_simulator: The Promotion Simulator is a Value-Added feature. Visit **Your Plan** to learn more.
chat.escalationOffer: I wasn't able to figure that one out. Would you like me to create a support request? Our team will get back to you quickly — and I'll include everything we've discussed so they have full context.
chat.escalationConfirm: Your support request has been created. We'll get back to you shortly — and we have the full context of our conversation.
chat.ticketConfirm: Your request is in — we'll follow up shortly.

diagnosis.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. This happens after being inactive for a while.
diagnosis.stepLogout: Log out using the Logout button
diagnosis.stepLogin: Log back in with your email and password
diagnosis.noPermission: You don't have permission for this action. This usually means you need the account owner to do this step.
diagnosis.stepCheckOwner: Check with the person who set up your PerkValet account
diagnosis.stepOwnerAction: They may need to log in and perform this action
diagnosis.stepUpgradeAccess: Or they can upgrade your access level in Team settings
diagnosis.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. This is usually temporary.
diagnosis.stepRefresh: Refresh the page and try again
diagnosis.stepKeepsHappening: If it keeps happening, we'll look into it
diagnosis.escalationMessage: We've captured the details — our team will investigate.
diagnosis.generic: We noticed something didn't work as expected. Here are some things to try.
diagnosis.stepLogoutLogin: Log out and log back in
diagnosis.stepContactSupport: If the issue continues, tap the button below to contact support
